name: mock-responder
description: Returns a configured static JSON response. Use in workflow tests to simulate downstream services without making real API calls.

RESPONSE.description: JSON string to return as the node output. Must be valid JSON.

ECHO_INPUT.description: When true, also include the input payload in the response under the '__input__' key.

FAIL_WITH.description: When non-empty, always fail the node with this error message (useful for testing error paths).
